name: qr-scanner
title: QR Scanner
description: Scan QR codes from your display and copy their contents to the clipboard.
author: arshaaad

commands.name: scan-display
commands.title: Scan Display for QR Code
commands.description: Quickly scan your display for one QR code and copy the decoded content.

commands.name: scan-multiple
commands.title: Scan Multiple QR Codes
commands.description: Deep scan your display for multiple QR codes and choose what to copy.

commands.name: scan-file
commands.title: Scan QR Code from File
commands.description: Select or drag-and-drop an image file to scan it for QR codes.

commands.name: scan-clipboard
commands.title: Scan QR Code from Clipboard
commands.description: Scan an image copied to your clipboard (e.g., from Snipping Tool).
